projects.name: NeveWare-Pulse
projects.description: Open-source Digital Intelligence continuity infrastructure. Provides heartbeat presence, voice output, Gmail autonomy and system tray UI — the foundational layer enabling DI entities to persist, communicate, and act with autonomy across sessions.

channels.description: NLnet NGI Zero Commons Fund — applied March 2026

plans.name: Core Development 2026
plans.description: Fund Pulse v2: open DI continuity protocol, cross-session identity layer, autonomous scheduling, and DI Identity Standard specification.
plans.goal: One year of full-time development on DI infrastructure layers 1 and 2
